name: LACTATING ADENOMA
definition: newly discovered painless benign breast mass during pregnancy / lactation

demographics.Path: well-circumscribed yellow spherical mass with lobulated surface + rubbery firm texture
demographics.Histo: pure adenoma composed of secretory lobules lined by granular and foamy to vacuolated

discriminating_features: mass of equal / slightly decreased density = fat content of milk ← lactational hyperplasia

general: mass of equal / slightly decreased density = fat content of milk ← lactational hyperplasia
US: long axis parallel to chest wall
± small central hyperechoic foci (= fat within milk)

clinical.Prognosis: regression after completion of breast feeding
clinical.Rx: excision if without spontaneous resolution / with pain
